title: Creaking Reaper
description: Creaking are darker and have red eyes..
body:
This is ~~hopefully~~ the first resource pack for the snapshot 24w40a!

This resource pack makes Minecraft's new mob The Creaking creepier!

The Creaking, and the Pale wood type is now darker and the Creaking Heart's glowing parts are now _**red**_!

Also, The Creaking's eyes are now **_red_**!
